chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.522 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 13.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Rahib Lakho, advocate for applicant Farooq Ahmed, Preventive Officer Customs JIAP Karachi SIP Saleem Akhtar CRO Branch ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant after arguing the bail application at some length does not press the instant criminal bail application and seeks direction to the trial Court for expeditious trial, preferably within a period of three months. Ms. Firdous Faridi, Special Prosecutor Customs, effected appearance on behalf of Customs Department and recorded her no objection for such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed, however, learned trial Court is directed to decide the case of the applicant expeditiously, preferably within a period of three months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS `
